description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-image` (T3-11) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-image/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, src/alt/width/height typed, loading (lazy/eager) typed, fit (cover/contain/fill) typed
2. Accessibility — alt text required (no empty alt unless decorative with explicit `decorative` prop), decorative images get alt="", loading state announced, axe-core pass
3. Tests — with/without alt, decorative, lazy loading, error state (broken image fallback), aspect ratio, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — responsive, with caption, broken image fallback, lazy loading demo
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, aspect ratio via CSS, CSS parts (img, caption, fallback)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB, native lazy loading preferred over JS intersection observer
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable, responsive images

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-image/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-image — T3-11 antagonistic quality review
